name: Peachy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the chicken pieces in flour.
2. Place the floured chicken in a baking dish.
3. Melt together white wine, butter, and water in a saucepan over low heat.
4. Pour the melted mixture evenly over the chicken in the baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and add sliced peaches and chopped walnuts on top of the chicken.
7. Return to the oven and bake an additional half hour, or until cooked through.
